tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 250002 Ink delivery to printhead failed during initial filling

abstract.p: Ink delivery to the printhead failed during initial filling (PH1, PH3, PH4, PH5, PH6).
After starting the ink supply it is expected to be stopped within a given time.
When this doesn't occur this error is reported. This error only occurs during the initial ink filling of the system.

note.p: The APSU tries to keep the printheads on vacuum in case of errors.
Due to empty printheads, the APSU might not be able to create the vacuum resulting in a follow-up error 7504 'large pressure leakage'.
This is caused by the empty printheads and is not a 'real' leakage problem

abstract.p: In some rare cases it's known the ink valve of a printhead might be blocked (even if the valve is opened).
In those cases please replace the valve by a new one (1070078229) or by removing the blockade by pushing a Torx-screwdriver through the valve.

li.p: Check the position of the pump tube in the ink pump.
Check the ink valves at the printheads. (see note above).
Check air hoses of the printheads:
No closed clamp on the air hose
Rube the air hose to make sure the hose is open.
